title: California Transport Sector Quarterly Trend Sheet - Q1 2025
content:
Key Highlights:

In Q1 2025, California's EV market saw a QoQ sales dip of 7.37%, with EV penetration and BEV sales falling, as hybrids gained share at the national level. Meanwhile, Renewable Diesel sales rose while Diesel sales declined. EVs witnessed a drop in the share of LDV sales in all counties with the exception of Kern, Alameda and San Francisco.
author: Mansift Kaur
